name: prompt-forge
description: PromptForge — a virtual prompt-engineering studio. A 12-agent crew that designs, writes, red-teams, and ships production-grade prompts and entire agent teams for any AI model or framework (Claude, GPT, Gemini, open models, LangGraph, CrewAI, n8n, and more). Tuned for the Claude 5 (Fable) era.
